definition: CREATE TRIGGER trg_set_banned_language_flag BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE OF content ON public.assets FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_banned_language_flag()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_mark_staging_emailed AFTER INSERT ON public.gmail_send_log FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION mark_staging_emailed_on_send()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_gmail_send_to_outbound_log AFTER INSERT ON public.gmail_send_log FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION sync_gmail_send_to_outbound_log()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_queue_attio_after_reply AFTER INSERT ON public.inbound_log FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION queue_attio_after_reply()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_irr_challenge_layer_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.irr_challenge_layer FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_irr_challenge_layer_updated_at()
CREATE TRIGGER lead_outreach_log_to_events AFTER INSERT ON public.lead_outreach_log FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bridge_outreach_log_to_events()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_posthog_purchase_on_insert AFTER INSERT ON public.orders FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION fire_posthog_purchase_event()

CREATE TRIGGER trg_posthog_purchase_on_status_change AFTER UPDATE ON public.orders FOR EACH ROW WHEN (((old.order_status IS DISTINCT FROM new.order_status) AND (new.order_status = 'completed'::text))) EXECUTE FUNCTION fire_posthog_purchase_event()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_queue_attio_after_send AFTER INSERT ON public.outbound_log FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION queue_attio_after_send()
CREATE TRIGGER purchases_post_buy AFTER INSERT ON public.purchases FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trigger_post_purchase()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_target_accounts_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.target_accounts FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_target_accounts_updated_at()
